description.zh-CN: 连接 PalPanel，同时支持 QwenPaw QQ 官方频道与 OneBot/NapCat，提供角色绑定、数字序号选择、Markdown/ASCII 双表格模式、服务器运维、管理 API 与补丁扩展接口。
description.en-US: PalPanel integration for QwenPaw official QQ and OneBot/NapCat with player binding, numbered selection, switchable Markdown/ASCII tables, server management APIs and patched endpoint support.
